productDisplayName: Spykar Men Ranger Front Graphic White Shirts
description: Composition White shirt made of 100% cotton, with front buttoned placket, tipped collar, full hand sleeves with mid-sleeve buttoned flap, small buttoned flaps on the shoulders, print across the right chest to the left shoulder and has a curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron The classic white casual shirt can never get classier than this shirt from spykar. The stylish print diagonally across the chest screams out your style mantra. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt from spykar. Pair it with denims or corduroys and brown footwear to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
